'));break;case 'subscription.view':{const g=await gate('subscription');await T(p.chat_id,['Subscription details','Tier: '+(g.tier||user.tier||'free'),'Trial ends: '+D(g.trial_end||user.trial_end),'Paid until: '+D(g.paid_until||user.paid_until)].join('

'));break;}case 'simulation.start':{const g=await gate('simulate');if(!g.access){await T(p.chat_id,deny('simulate',g));break;}const [active]=N(await R('ifyrt_get_active_simulation',{p_user_id:user.user_id}));if(active?.simulation_id){await T(p.chat_id,'You already have an active simulation. '));break;}case 'live.enable':{const g=await gate('live');if(!g.access){await T(p.chat_id,deny('live',g));break;}const [c]=N(await R('ifyrt_resolve_live_context',{p_user_id:user.user_id}));if(!c?.symbol||!c?.strategy){await T(p.chat_id,'Start a simulation first so live mode has a symbol and strategy context to promote.');break;}if(!c.key_reference){await T(p.chat_id,'No secure API key is stored for that exchange yet. '));break;}case 'copy.stats':{const stats=await R('ifyrt_copy_follower_stats',{p_user_id:user.user_id})||{};await T(p.chat_id,['Copy Trading Stats','Realized PnL: '+Number(stats.realized_pnl||0).toFixed(2),'Active subscriptions: '+(stats.active_count||0)].join('
'));break;}case 'copy.share':{await I('copy_profiles',{user_id:user.user_id,username:user.username,is_public:true,allow_copy:true},{onConflict:'user_id',merge:true});await T(p.chat_id,'Your profile is now public and copyable.');break;}case 'copy.hide':{await P('copy_profiles',{user_id:'eq.'+user.user_id},{is_public:false,allow_copy:false});await T(p.chat_id,'Your profile is now hidden.');break;}case 'dashboard.request':{const g=await gate('dashboard');if(!g.access){await T(p.chat_id,deny('dashboard',g));break;}await T(p.chat_id,dash?'Dashboard: '+dash:'Set DASHBOARD_URL in n8n before using /dashboard.');break;}case 'key.submit':{await R('ifyrt_store_exchange_api_keys',{p_user_id:user.user_id,p_exchange:b.exchange,p_api_key:b.api_key,p_api_secret:b.api_secret,p_label:b.label||null});await T(p.chat_id,'Key saved securely.
